strategic_objectives: Improve customer retention through faster, higher-quality support
Scale support capacity without proportional headcount growth

business_objective.objective_statement: Create support capacity by reducing time spent locating trusted answers and drafting responses.
business_objective.challenge: Case volume is growing faster than the support team can scale, and knowledge is fragmented across systems.
business_objective.initiative: AI-assisted support workflows on Glean Search, Assistant, and approved Skills.
business_objective.positive_business_outcome: Faster resolution and lower escalation pressure without quality loss.

use_cases.name: AI-assisted case resolution
use_cases.description: Agents use Search, Assistant, and approved Skills to locate trusted answers and draft responses for review.
use_cases.impact_rationale: Resolution time and escalation pressure are the largest drivers of support capacity.
use_cases.effort_rationale: Workflows and knowledge sources already exist; change is concentrated in agent work habits.
uncertainties: Case mix shifts during the comparison window
Concurrent process changes in escalation policy

use_cases.name: Knowledge base upkeep assistance
use_cases.description: Knowledge owners use AI drafting support to keep trusted articles current.
use_cases.impact_rationale: Stale knowledge drives repeat lookups and escalations.
use_cases.effort_rationale: Smaller population; depends on the case-resolution pilot landing first.
